title: grammitis praeclara
intro: Grammitis praeclara, also known as the goldie fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Grammitis praeclara include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Grammitis praeclara include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
